name: hoc/command-palette
description: A higher-level command-palette wrapper around the Command component that manages open/close state, keyboard shortcut registration (Ctrl+K / Cmd+K), grouped items, and empty-state handling. Renders items inside a CommandDialog with optional icon, shortcut badges via Kbd, and i18n label support. Composed of Command primitives, Kbd, and Popover components.
useCases: Global 'Spotlight' search in productivity apps for pages, actions, and settings
Developer-tool command centers for running queries, switching projects, or opening docs
CMS quick-navigation palettes for jumping to posts, media, users, or plugins
Keyboard-first workflow apps that expose every action via a searchable command dialog
usage: import { CommandPalette, type CommandPaletteProps, type CommandPaletteItem, type CommandPaletteGroup } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/command-palette"
